content:
# Seismology

**Summary**: The study of the properties of waves and elastic materials, particularly in the Earth.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] conducted research within the field of seismology to improve seismic data quality.

- [[2023-bargees|Bargees, 2023]] investigated seismic wave propagation and signal processing for first arrival detection.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] ['signal-processing', 'refraction-seismics']

- [[2023-bargees|Bargees, 2023]] investigated seismic wave propagation and signal processing for first arrival detection.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] ['crosscorrelation', 'summation']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Supervirtual methods successfully improved SNR and first arrival accuracy in 3D surveys. ([[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016, p. 68]])

- The HEEH method provides a robust, automated way to pick arrivals in zero-phase data. ([[2023-bargees|Bargees, 2023, p. 70]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] Noise and ray-path problems in complex 3D geometries.
